detail_text: 【Product Description】 ▪ Material: PU High Elastic Compression Sponge ▪ Applicable People: Child ▪ Color: Red ,blue ,black ▪ Size(L*W*H): 35 * 20* 5cm ▪ Weight: 280g ▪ Package Included ▪ 1 X Kick Pad Target 【Product Features】 ▪ Good Hitting And Sound Effects, Suitable For Professional Team Training, Easy To Grip Handle, Added Anti Slip Belt, And More Flexible Free Target. Built In Steel Plate Interlayer, Wear-resistant, Corrosion-resistant, Tough, Lightweight, Super Explosion-proof, Effectively Solves The Problem Of Bamboo Side Breakage And Avoids Safety Hazards Of Foot Targets. ▪ Full Body Sponge Filling, Children And Adults Can Kick Recklessly Without Hurting Their Feet ▪ Super Large Target Surface Hits Louder With A Diameter Of 20CM And Widened Board Surface, Allowing For Unrestrained Kicking ▪ EPE Cushioning And Compression Resistant Layer Protects The User's Joints, Ensuring They Are Flexible And Not Easily Broken ▪ Bold Nylon Thread Is Sturdy, Durable, And Has Good Exhaust Performance. It Is Firmly Sewn Together ▪ Anti Slip Thick Grip Foot Target, Full Body Double-layer Sponge, Strong Seismic Resistance Effect ▪ Expert Designers In Ergonomics Design Are Dedicated To Creating A Comfortable Grip ▪ Full target 2.5cm EVA sponge, thickened high-density and high elasticity sponge to protect hands and feet ▪ High Quality, High Peel Space Leather With High Strength, Tear Resistance, Explosion Resistance, Wear Resistance, And Corrosion Resistance
detail_html:
【Product Description】

▪ Material: PU High Elastic Compression Sponge

▪ Applicable People: Child

▪ Color: Red ,blue ,black

▪ Size(L*W*H): 35 * 20* 5cm

▪ Weight: 280g

▪ Package Included

▪ 1 X Kick Pad Target

【Product Features】

▪ Good Hitting And Sound Effects, Suitable For Professional Team Training, Easy To Grip Handle, Added Anti Slip Belt, And More Flexible Free Target. Built In Steel Plate Interlayer, Wear-resistant, Corrosion-resistant, Tough, Lightweight, Super Explosion-proof, Effectively Solves The Problem Of Bamboo Side Breakage And Avoids Safety Hazards Of Foot Targets.

▪ Full Body Sponge Filling, Children And Adults Can Kick Recklessly Without Hurting Their Feet

▪ Super Large Target Surface Hits Louder With A Diameter Of 20CM And Widened Board Surface, Allowing For Unrestrained Kicking

▪ EPE Cushioning And Compression Resistant Layer Protects The User's Joints, Ensuring They Are Flexible And Not Easily Broken

▪ Bold Nylon Thread Is Sturdy, Durable, And Has Good Exhaust Performance. It Is Firmly Sewn Together

▪ Anti Slip Thick Grip Foot Target, Full Body Double-layer Sponge, Strong Seismic Resistance Effect

▪ Expert Designers In Ergonomics Design Are Dedicated To Creating A Comfortable Grip

▪ Full target 2.5cm EVA sponge, thickened high-density and high elasticity sponge to protect hands and feet

▪ High Quality, High Peel Space Leather With High Strength, Tear Resistance, Explosion Resistance, Wear Resistance, And Corrosion Resistance

title: GINGPAI | Arc-shaped Sparring Kick Target Boxing Target Kicking Target Pad Taekwondo Thick Hand Target
detail_text: Online Exclusive As an online-only product, the Competing Pie arc-shaped kickboxing target offers exclusive access to high-quality training tools directly from the manufacturer. Thickened Design The Competing Pie arc-shaped kickboxing target is designed with a thickened layer for enhanced durability and longevity, perfect for rigorous training sessions. Winter 2022 Launch Launched in Winter 2022, this new addition to the Competing Pie lineup brings cutting-edge technology and design to your training regime. No Store Availability With no store availability, customers can enjoy the convenience of purchasing the Competing Pie arc-shaped kickboxing target directly from the comfort of their homes. Versatile Training Tool This versatile training equipment is ideal for various martial arts including Thai boxing, kickboxing, and Taekwondo, making it a must-have for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.
detail_html:
Online Exclusive



As an online-only product, the Competing Pie arc-shaped kickboxing target offers exclusive access to high-quality training tools directly from the manufacturer.






Thickened Design



The Competing Pie arc-shaped kickboxing target is designed with a thickened layer for enhanced durability and longevity, perfect for rigorous training sessions.






Winter 2022 Launch



Launched in Winter 2022, this new addition to the Competing Pie lineup brings cutting-edge technology and design to your training regime.






No Store Availability



With no store availability, customers can enjoy the convenience of purchasing the Competing Pie arc-shaped kickboxing target directly from the comfort of their homes.






Versatile Training Tool



This versatile training equipment is ideal for various martial arts including Thai boxing, kickboxing, and Taekwondo, making it a must-have for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.

title: Flameer Boxing Punching Mitts Bags Boxing Training Equipment Hand Target Pads with Curved Leather for Martial Arts MMA Muay Thai Kicking Sparring Karate
detail_text: Description: - Highly efficient shock absorption. Hand-Shaped Mould. Constructed to fit the natural curvature of your hands - Focus Punch Pad and Light weight foam provide superior shock absorbency and can lessen trainers fatigue. - Placed perforations on upper layer for air ventilation provides breathability and keeps trainer hands . Half Ball Palm Grip allows for a comfortable . - Curved boxing pads were designed with trainer's in Helps keep hands cooler and increases breathability of the mitts. - High quality and durable material is easier to clean and maintain. Specification: - Material: PU - Size: approx. 17x19cm/6.69x7.48inch Package Includes: - 1 Piece Boxing Mitts Note: - 1. Please allow slightly error due to manual measurement. - 2. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item. - 3. Wish you a wonderful line shopping!
detail_html:
Description:

- Highly efficient shock absorption. Hand-Shaped Mould. Constructed to fit the natural curvature of your hands
- Focus Punch Pad and Light weight foam provide superior shock absorbency and can lessen trainers fatigue.
- Placed perforations on upper layer for air ventilation provides breathability and keeps trainer hands . Half Ball Palm Grip allows for a comfortable .
- Curved boxing pads were designed with trainer's in Helps keep hands cooler and increases breathability of the mitts.
- High quality and durable material is easier to clean and maintain.

Specification:

- Material: PU
- Size: approx. 17x19cm/6.69x7.48inch

Package Includes:

- 1 Piece Boxing Mitts

Note:

- 1. Please allow slightly error due to manual measurement.
- 2. Due to the difference between different monitors, the picture may not reflect the actual color of the item.
- 3. Wish you a wonderful line shopping!

These wear-resistant pads provide shock absorption and cushioning, ensuring a and enjoyable training experience for both you and your trainer 4.Comfortable Fit: Our boxing pads feature ergonomic designs to improve balance and accuracy. Its adjustable wrist straps ensure comfortable and impactful training 5.Easy to Carry: With these boxing pads designed for precision and speed, trainers of all ages can improve their skill, power, and speed. The compact size and lightweight design make it easy to bring anywhere, from home to the gym Upgrade your boxing game with these high-quality Boxing Mitts made with lightweight and thick PU . Perfect for home gym or club training, these Boxing Mitts come with adjustable wrist straps for ultimate comfort. Get an excellent cardio workout with this equipment for boxers and fitness enthusiasts alike. title: TIANQUAN | Multifunctional Wall-mounted Boxing Pad
detail_text: Multi-functional Design This wall-mounted boxing bag offers a multi-functional design, ideal for various martial arts training including boxing, Muay Thai, and kickboxing. Versatile Training Tool This versatile training tool is suitable for both beginners and professionals, making it a great addition to any fitness routine. Durable Material Made with durable materials, this wall target withstands rigorous training sessions, ensuring long-lasting use. Home Fitness Equipment Perfect for home fitness enthusiasts, this wall target provides a convenient way to maintain physical fitness and improve martial arts skills. Space-saving Feature Its wall-mounted feature makes it an excellent space-saving solution for those with limited workout areas at home.

Ideal for various martial arts disciplines including Taekwondo, Muay Thai, and Boxing, offering versatile training options.






Safety First



Equipped with protective leg boards, this target ensures safety during intense training sessions.






High-Quality Material



Crafted from durable materials, this training equipment ensures longevity and resilience for rigorous use.






Professional Grade



Designed for professional martial arts training, this equipment meets the demands of serious practitioners.

page_json.description: GINGPAI

title: GINGPAI | Training Gear Arc Curved Thickened Boxing Punching Target 1pc
detail_text: Efficient Design The arc-shaped design offers a realistic punching experience, enhancing your technique and power. Suitable for All Levels Whether you're a beginner or an experienced martial artist, this equipment is suitable for all skill levels, helping you improve your skills. Professional Training Equipment This training gear is designed for professional boxers and martial artists, providing a robust and durable target for intense training sessions. Enhanced Durability The thickened design ensures longevity and resistance to heavy impacts, making it a reliable companion for your training regimen. Versatile Training Tool Ideal for various martial arts such as Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and mixed martial arts, this equipment caters to a wide range of training needs.
detail_html:
Efficient Design



The arc-shaped design offers a realistic punching experience, enhancing your technique and power.






Suitable for All Levels



Whether you're a beginner or an experienced martial artist, this equipment is suitable for all skill levels, helping you improve your skills.






Professional Training Equipment



This training gear is designed for professional boxers and martial artists, providing a robust and durable target for intense training sessions.






Enhanced Durability



The thickened design ensures longevity and resistance to heavy impacts, making it a reliable companion for your training regimen.






Versatile Training Tool



Ideal for various martial arts such as Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and mixed martial arts, this equipment caters to a wide range of training needs.

brand.name: GINGPAI
brand.suggestion: More Boxing and Martial Arts Equipment from GINGPAI

product.desc:
Efficient Design



The arc-shaped design offers a realistic punching experience, enhancing your technique and power.






Suitable for All Levels



Whether you're a beginner or an experienced martial artist, this equipment is suitable for all skill levels, helping you improve your skills.






Professional Training Equipment



This training gear is designed for professional boxers and martial artists, providing a robust and durable target for intense training sessions.






Enhanced Durability



The thickened design ensures longevity and resistance to heavy impacts, making it a reliable companion for your training regimen.






Versatile Training Tool



Ideal for various martial arts such as Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and mixed martial arts, this equipment caters to a wide range of training needs.

title: High-Quality PU Leather Boxing Focus Pads for Martial Arts Training Boxing Shields for Kickboxing and Karate Practice Durable Equipment
detail_text: Boxing Focus Pad PU Leather Kickboxing Punching Bag Muay Thai Foot Target Lightweight for Kicking Boxing Shield Training Features: 1. High-Quality PU Leather: Our Martial Arts Kick Pad is made with PU leather, ensuring durability and resistance to impact. The selected material not only provides a comfortable striking surface but also allows for the release of excess gas, maintaining optimal inside the pad for smooth and effective training sessions. The use of PU leather also ensures easy cleaning and maintenance, extending the lifespan of the kick pad. 2. Multi-layered EVA Inner Padding: Designed with multiple layers of EVA foam padding, our kick pad offers enhanced shock absorption and durability. The inner padding effectively absorbs and disperses the impact force, providing reliable protection for both the trainer and the trainee. 3. Triple Protection System: Our boxing kick pad features a three-level protective design. The anti-slip grip handle enables a secure hold during training, preventing accidental slips. The elastic straps and nylon fastening band securely attach the pad to the arm, ensuring it stays in place without slipping or coming loose. This triple protection system enhances safety and provides a stable and comfortable training experience. 4. Exquisite Cross-Stitching and Reinforced Design: The side panels of our kick pad are meticulously cross-stitched, adding an elegant aesthetic touch. The binding rope design further reinforces the pad's structure and prevents it from unraveling or getting damaged over time. The reinforced stitching at the handle area ensures long-lasting durability, making it to wear and tear even during intense training sessions. 5. Versatile Training Accessory: Suitable for various combat sports disciplines such as Muay Thai, boxing, taekwondo, and more, our kick pad delivers superior shock absorption and resilience. It effectively reduces the impact the trainer's hands or legs while providing the trainee with a realistic target to practice striking techniques. With its excellent cushioning, durability, and kick-resistance properties, this training pad is an essential tool for martial arts enthusiasts and trainers alike. Specification: Origin: Mainland China Age: >3 Years Type: Sandbag Category Main Material: Pu Color: Black With Red Side, White With Blue Side, Black With Black Side Size: 390.00mm (15.35in) X 200.00mm (7.87in) X 90.00mm (3.54in) Gross Weight: 280g Note: Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed the pictures. Thank you! Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.
detail_html:
Boxing Focus Pad PU Leather Kickboxing Punching Bag Muay Thai Foot Target Lightweight for Kicking Boxing Shield Training

Features:
1. High-Quality PU Leather: Our Martial Arts Kick Pad is made with PU leather, ensuring durability and resistance to impact. The selected material not only provides a comfortable striking surface but also allows for the release of excess gas, maintaining optimal inside the pad for smooth and effective training sessions. The use of PU leather also ensures easy cleaning and maintenance, extending the lifespan of the kick pad.
2. Multi-layered EVA Inner Padding: Designed with multiple layers of EVA foam padding, our kick pad offers enhanced shock absorption and durability. The inner padding effectively absorbs and disperses the impact force, providing reliable protection for both the trainer and the trainee.
3. Triple Protection System: Our boxing kick pad features a three-level protective design. The anti-slip grip handle enables a secure hold during training, preventing accidental slips. The elastic straps and nylon fastening band securely attach the pad to the arm, ensuring it stays in place without slipping or coming loose. This triple protection system enhances safety and provides a stable and comfortable training experience.
4. Exquisite Cross-Stitching and Reinforced Design: The side panels of our kick pad are meticulously cross-stitched, adding an elegant aesthetic touch. The binding rope design further reinforces the pad's structure and prevents it from unraveling or getting damaged over time. The reinforced stitching at the handle area ensures long-lasting durability, making it to wear and tear even during intense training sessions.
5. Versatile Training Accessory: Suitable for various combat sports disciplines such as Muay Thai, boxing, taekwondo, and more, our kick pad delivers superior shock absorption and resilience. It effectively reduces the impact the trainer's hands or legs while providing the trainee with a realistic target to practice striking techniques. With its excellent cushioning, durability, and kick-resistance properties, this training pad is an essential tool for martial arts enthusiasts and trainers alike.

Color: Black With Red Side, White With Blue Side, Black With Black Side

page_json.category: Sports & Outdoors Activities Equipment > Boxing and Martial Arts Equipment
page_json.description: Boxing Focus Pad PU Leather Kickboxing Punching Bag Muay Thai Foot Target Lightweight for Kicking Boxing Shield Training   Features: 1. High-Quality PU Leather: Our Martial Arts Kick Pad is made with PU leather, ensuring durability and resistance to impact. The selected material not only provides a comfortable striking surface but also allows for the release of excess gas, maintaining optimal inside the pad for smooth and effective training sessions. The use of PU leather also ensures easy cleaning and maintenance, extending the lifespan of the kick pad. 2. Multi-layered EVA Inner Padding: Designed with multiple layers of EVA foam padding, our kick pad offers enhanced shock absorption and durability. The inner padding effectively absorbs and disperses the impact force, providing reliable protection for both the trainer and the trainee. 3. Triple Protection System: Our boxing kick pad features a three-level protective design. The anti-slip grip handle enables a secure hold during training, preventing accidental slips. The elastic straps and nylon fastening band securely attach the pad to the arm, ensuring it stays in place without slipping or coming loose. This triple protection system enhances safety and provides a stable and comfortable training experience. 4. Exquisite Cross-Stitching and Reinforced Design: The side panels of our kick pad are meticulously cross-stitched, adding an elegant aesthetic touch. The binding rope design further reinforces the pad's structure and prevents it from unraveling or getting damaged over time. The reinforced stitching at the handle area ensures long-lasting durability, making it to wear and tear even during intense training sessions. 5. Versatile Training Accessory: Suitable for various combat sports disciplines such as Muay Thai, boxing, taekwondo, and more, our kick pad delivers superior shock absorption and resilience. It effectively reduces the impact the trainer's hands or legs while providing the trainee with a realistic target to practice striking techniques. With its excellent cushioning, durability, and kick-resistance properties, this training pad is an essential tool for martial arts enthusiasts and trainers alike.  Specification: Origin: Mainland China Age: >3 Years  Type: Sandbag Category   Main Material: Pu Color: Black With Red Side, White With Blue Side, Black With Black Side Size: 390.00mm (15.35in) X 200.00mm (7.87in) X 90.00mm (3.54in) Gross Weight: 280g    Note: Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed the pictures. Thank you! Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.

title: GINGPAI | Training Hand Pads for Boxing Muay Thai Taekwondo Kickboxing
detail_text: Arc-Shaped Structure The arc-shaped structure of the glove target offers a realistic training experience, allowing practitioners to mimic real combat scenarios effectively. Enhanced Protection Designed with user safety in mind, the glove target provides superior protection, reducing the risk of injury during intense training sessions. Online Exclusive As an online exclusive product, the Competing Pie boxing glove target offers convenience and accessibility for martial arts enthusiasts worldwide. Thickened Design The Competing Pie boxing glove target features a thickened design, providing enhanced protection and durability for rigorous training sessions. Versatile Usage This versatile training aid is suitable for various martial arts such as Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and Sanda, making it an ideal choice for athletes across different disciplines.

Arc-Shaped Structure



The arc-shaped structure of the glove target offers a realistic training experience, allowing practitioners to mimic real combat scenarios effectively.






Enhanced Protection

Online Exclusive

Thickened Design

Versatile Usage

brand.suggestion: More Boxing and Martial Arts Equipment from GINGPAI

product.desc:
Arc-Shaped Structure



The arc-shaped structure of the glove target offers a realistic training experience, allowing practitioners to mimic real combat scenarios effectively.






Enhanced Protection



Designed with user safety in mind, the glove target provides superior protection, reducing the risk of injury during intense training sessions.






Online Exclusive



As an online exclusive product, the Competing Pie boxing glove target offers convenience and accessibility for martial arts enthusiasts worldwide.






Thickened Design



The Competing Pie boxing glove target features a thickened design, providing enhanced protection and durability for rigorous training sessions.






Versatile Usage



This versatile training aid is suitable for various martial arts such as Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and Sanda, making it an ideal choice for athletes across different disciplines.

page_json.name: GINGPAI | Training Hand Pads for Boxing Muay Thai Taekwondo Kickboxing
page_json.category: Sports & Outdoors Activities Equipment > Boxing and Martial Arts Equipment
page_json.description: Versatile training pads for Boxing, Muay Thai, and kickboxing, featuring Graffiti and Starlight designs. These kicking targets come in various colors and types, offering comprehensive support for hand and foot strikes in martial arts training. - Lazada

title: LARA STAR | Joint Protection Pads Boxing Wraps
detail_text: Joint Protection The joint protection pad ensures your fists stay safe and secure, reducing the risk of injury during sparring or training. Versatile Use Ideal for boxing, Muay Thai, and other striking sports, this wrap offers versatility and adaptability to different training needs. UFC Approved Approved by the UFC, this product meets the highest standards of quality and performance in the world of combat sports. Gel Pad Design The Laura Star 0756 boxing wrap features a gel pad design, providing superior protection and comfort during intense training sessions. MMA Compatibility This product is compatible with MMA, making it a versatile choice for various martial arts disciplines.
detail_html:
Joint Protection



The joint protection pad ensures your fists stay safe and secure, reducing the risk of injury during sparring or training.






Versatile Use



Ideal for boxing, Muay Thai, and other striking sports, this wrap offers versatility and adaptability to different training needs.






UFC Approved



Approved by the UFC, this product meets the highest standards of quality and performance in the world of combat sports.






Gel Pad Design



The Laura Star 0756 boxing wrap features a gel pad design, providing superior protection and comfort during intense training sessions.






MMA Compatibility



This product is compatible with MMA, making it a versatile choice for various martial arts disciplines.

product.desc:
Joint Protection



The joint protection pad ensures your fists stay safe and secure, reducing the risk of injury during sparring or training.






Versatile Use



Ideal for boxing, Muay Thai, and other striking sports, this wrap offers versatility and adaptability to different training needs.






UFC Approved



Approved by the UFC, this product meets the highest standards of quality and performance in the world of combat sports.






Gel Pad Design



The Laura Star 0756 boxing wrap features a gel pad design, providing superior protection and comfort during intense training sessions.






MMA Compatibility



This product is compatible with MMA, making it a versatile choice for various martial arts disciplines.

page_json.category: Sports & Outdoors Activities Equipment > Boxing and Martial Arts Equipment
page_json.description: Practice Punching Kicking Pads for Training

title: Kids Taekwondo PU Rebound Sponge Durable Double Kick Pad Target Boxing Sanda Pad For Tae Kwon Do Karate Training Small Gifts
detail_text: Description: 1. This goal is ideally designed on both sides to improve muscle accuracy and strength. 2. Double kick pad design: It consists of two pu target leaves that will beep when you kick it. 3. The wrist grip design prevents the goal of kicking karate down. 4 Durable PU leather, easy to clean, and high elastic compression sponge inside, providing the required elasticity of the cushion. Specifications: Material: PU+ high elastic compression sponge Applicable people: Child Color: Red ,blue ,black, yellow ,green Size: 38*18cm/14.96*7.09'' Package Includes: 1 x Kick Pad Target Note: 1. Please note that the photo does not show actual size, please refer to Description for size details. 2. Please allow differences due to manual measurement, thanks. 3. Due to the difference between different monitors, the image may not reflect the actual color of the item.
detail_html:
Description:

1. This goal is ideally designed on both sides to improve muscle accuracy and strength.

2. Double kick pad design: It consists of two pu target leaves that will beep when you kick it.

3. The wrist grip design prevents the goal of kicking karate down.

4 Durable PU leather, easy to clean, and high elastic compression sponge inside, providing the required elasticity of the cushion.

Specifications:

Material: PU+ high elastic compression sponge

Applicable people: Child

Color: Red ,blue ,black, yellow ,green

Size: 38*18cm/14.96*7.09''

Package Includes:

1 x Kick Pad Target

Note:

1. Please note that the photo does not show actual size, please refer to Description for size details.

2. Please allow differences due to manual measurement, thanks.

3. Due to the difference between different monitors, the image may not reflect the actual color of the item.

title: SZG Boxing Leather Punch Focus Mitts,Target Training Hand Pads for Karate, Muay Thai Kick, Sparring, Dojo, Martial Arts 1103
detail_text: Boxing Leather Punch Focus Mitts,Target Training Hand Pads for Karate, Muay Thai Kick, Sparring, Dojo, Martial Arts Details WEAR-RESISTING PADDING - one-step molding dense foam for taking those hard punches, giving your good cushion. Thick but lightweight hand pads help you from feeling pain after mitt workouts, and also provide more flexibility with a variety of strikes and styles. PU LEATHER SURFACE - Smooth surface made with high-quality PU leather, soft and comfortable with non-toxic. Hem with strong nylon string prevents the padding from bulging out. Excellent durable stitching is against off-line for building to last. Enough for a large hand. Adjustable wrist strap on the back allows to fit nicely on most hands. They fit snugly and are actually very breathable. VERSATILE - One pair punch mitts included, great for Kickboxing,Karate Muay Thai Kick, Sparring, Dojo, Martial arts, Cardio and other fighting or striking practice. Colour:Black + white Material:PU leather Size:25*15*5cm Package Contents: 1 pair * Boxing Mitts Only the above package content, other products are not included. Note: Light shooting and different displays may cause the color of the item in the picture a little different from the real thing. The measurement allowed error is +/- 1-3cm. detail_text: Versatile Training Tool Ideal for boxing, kickboxing, and taekwondo, this target offers a versatile training solution for various martial arts disciplines. Efficient Response Training This target is specifically designed to improve your reaction time and accuracy in martial arts training. High-Quality Material Crafted from durable materials, this training equipment ensures long-lasting use and robust performance. Optimized Design The arc-shaped design of the target enhances its stability and allows for more realistic training scenarios. Enhanced Safety Features Designed with thickened padding, this handbag provides superior protection during intense training sessions.

Versatile Training Tool



Ideal for boxing, kickboxing, and taekwondo, this target offers a versatile training solution for various martial arts disciplines.






Efficient Response Training



This target is specifically designed to improve your reaction time and accuracy in martial arts training.

detail_html:
• Effective Reaction Training : Designed to improve reaction time and accuracy, this target helps you develop quick reflexes in combat sports.






• Suitable for All Levels : Whether you're a beginner or an experienced fighter, this target provides challenging practice for all skill levels.






• High-Quality Material : Made from durable materials, this target withstands intense training sessions, ensuring long-lasting use.






• Portable Design : Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to practice anywhere and anytime.






• Versatile Training Equipment : This boxing target is ideal for various martial arts training, including Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and Sanda, enhancing your fighting skills.

detail_blocks.text: • Effective Reaction Training : Designed to improve reaction time and accuracy, this target helps you develop quick reflexes in combat sports. • Suitable for All Levels : Whether you're a beginner or an experienced fighter, this target provides challenging practice for all skill levels. • High-Quality Material : Made from durable materials, this target withstands intense training sessions, ensuring long-lasting use. • Portable Design : Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to practice anywhere and anytime. • Versatile Training Equipment : This boxing target is ideal for various martial arts training, including Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and Sanda, enhancing your fighting skills.

product.desc:
• Effective Reaction Training : Designed to improve reaction time and accuracy, this target helps you develop quick reflexes in combat sports.






• Suitable for All Levels : Whether you're a beginner or an experienced fighter, this target provides challenging practice for all skill levels.






• High-Quality Material : Made from durable materials, this target withstands intense training sessions, ensuring long-lasting use.






• Portable Design : Its compact size makes it easy to carry around, allowing you to practice anywhere and anytime.






• Versatile Training Equipment : This boxing target is ideal for various martial arts training, including Muay Thai, Taekwondo, and Sanda, enhancing your fighting skills.
product.title: Boxing Training Equipment Thai Muay Tai Taekwondo Practice Target Pad MMA Fighting Practice Board Sport Entertainment
